reviews.review_title: Here why you should not get this game
reviews.review_description: I got banned because someone thought I was using up and down and plats and a admin wanted to check me basically by having my mod Menu open and moving my arms up and down will make me equip mods and it made me equip no clip up and down plats and no gravity and I told what exactly happened and the admin still said I was cheating and banned me if you ever saw me my name was moonlit andmy YouTube channel is Khamrenwaltonmayor they both are mines also I washing to make some videos on the game to get AA creator or finger painter but now Igot banned I don’t like this game thats why you should not get the game try out monkey tag or super tag they are way better bye thanks for reading

reviews.review_title: One of the worst games I've ever played.
reviews.review_description: I heard some loser steadily calling my little brother the n word and told him to khs. I joined the lobby and he kept calling me fat and the n word and said he was gonna kill me. My brother. And my parents. This is genuinely the worst game I've ever played. Fix your community or at least get some decent moderation.

So my cousin was pLaying this game and someone named (lffihggf) weird name BTW.  so he said very horrible things then just rasicism. First he said that the player told my cousin to *kill* himself and stuff like that he also said horrible things about my cousins parents( BTW my cousins name in game was had now a1) now he said  to my cousin that my cousins dad should die in his sleep he also said to him that his mom is fat. Next he my cousin said that he spammed the nword  multiple times. The game is good overall but the community is not to good
